message.content:
@startuml
title 蓝牙配对 - 搜索流程

left to right direction
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center

participant "IotRecorderManager" as IotRecorderManager
participant "DevicesManagerMachine" as DevicesManagerMachine
participant "BlueDiscoveryControl" as BlueDiscoveryControl
participant "BlueBondControl" as BlueBondControl
participant "BleScanControl" as BleScanControl
participant "BluetoothGattConfig" as BluetoothGattConfig
participant "BluetoothAdapter" as BluetoothAdapter
participant "BluetoothDevice" as BluetoothDevice
participant "BluetoothGatt" as BluetoothGatt
participant "WifiList" as WifiList

note right of IotRecorderManager
  记录
end note

note right of DevicesManagerMachine
  sdk_client
end note

note right of BluetoothAdapter
  蓝牙适配器
end note

note right of BluetoothDevice
  蓝牙设备
end note

note right of BluetoothGatt
  蓝牙Gatt
end note

note right of WifiList
  Wifi列表
end note

IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine : initState.enter
DevicesManagerMachine -> BlueDiscoveryControl : registerReceiver

IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine : startDiscoveryDevice
DevicesManagerMachine -> BlueDiscoveryControl : startDiscoveryDevice
BlueDiscoveryControl -> DevicesManagerMachine : CMD_DISCOVERY_START
DevicesManagerMachine -> BlueDiscoveryControl : DiscoveryState.enter
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BlueDiscoveryControl : registerReceiver
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BlueDiscoveryControl : new DiscoveryBroadcastReceiver
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BlueDiscoveryControl : startDiscovery
BlueDiscoveryControl -> BluetoothAdapter : startDiscovery
BluetoothAdapter -> BlueDiscoveryControl : DiscoveryBroadcastReceiver
BlueDiscoveryControl -> DevicesManagerMachine : MSG_DISCOVERY_FOUND
DevicesManagerMachine -> IotRecorderManager : MSG_DISCOVERY_FOUND
note right of DevicesManagerMachine
  返回搜索到的蓝牙设备信息：BluetoothDevice
end note

IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine : BondDevice
DevicesManagerMachine -> BlueBondControl : BondDevice
BlueBondControl -> DevicesManagerMachine : CMD_BOND_DEVICE
DevicesManagerMachine -> BlueBondControl : cancelDiscovery
BlueBondControl -> BluetoothAdapter : cancelDiscovery
BlueBondControl -> BluetoothDevice : bondDevice
BlueBondControl -> BluetoothDevice : createBond
BlueBondControl -> BlueBondControl : BondBroadcastReceiver
BlueBondControl -> DevicesManagerMachine : MSG_BOND_SUCCESS
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine : BondedState.enter
DevicesManagerMachine -> IotRecorderManager : MSG_BOND_SUCCESS
note right of DevicesManagerMachine
  返回绑定设备成功
end note

IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine : connectGatt
DevicesManagerMachine -> BlueScanControl : connectGatt
BlueScanControl -> DevicesManagerMachine : CMD_CONNECT_GATT
DevicesManagerMachine -> BleScanControl : BleScanState.enter
BleScanControl -> BleScanControl : StartLeScan
BleScanControl -> BluetoothAdapter : getBluetoothLeScanner().startScan
BluetoothAdapter -> BleScanControl : ScanCallback.onScanResult
BleScanControl -> BluetoothAdapter : getBluetoothLeScanner().stopScan
BleScanControl -> DevicesManagerMachine : MSG_LESCAN_RESULT
DevicesManagerMachine -> BluetoothGattConfig : connect
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothAdapter : connectGatt
BluetoothAdapter -> BluetoothGattConfig : BluetoothGattCallback.onConnectionStateChange
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGattConfig : discoverServices
note right of BluetoothGattConfig
  发现远程设备提供的服务，以及它们包含的特征特性和描述符
end note
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGattConfig : onServicesDiscovered
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGattConfig : setCharacteristicNotification
note right of BluetoothGattConfig
  拿到需要的服务和特征
end note
BluetoothGattConfig -> DevicesManagerMachine : MSG_GATT_GETSERVICE_SUCCEED
DevicesManagerMachine -> DevicesManagerMachine : GattConnectedState.enter
DevicesManagerMachine -> IotRecorderManager : MSG_GATT_CONNECTED
note right of DevicesManagerMachine
  BleScanState --> GattConnectedState
end note

IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine : syncWifiState
DevicesManagerMachine -> BluetoothGattConfig : syncWifiState
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGattConfig : CMD_SYNC_WIFI_STATE
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGattConfig : setCharacteristic
note right of BluetoothGattConfig
  向服务端传递数据
end note
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGattConfig : writeCharacteristic
note right of BluetoothGattConfig
  向服务端传递数据
end note
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGattConfig : onCharacteristicChanged
note right of BluetoothGattConfig
  _UUID_WIFI_STATE特征值
end note
BluetoothGattConfig -> DevicesManagerMachine : processMessage
DevicesManagerMachine -> IotRecorderManager : processMessage
note right of DevicesManagerMachine
  message.what = DevicesManagerMachine.MSG_WIFI_STATE;
  message.arg1 = WifiManagerMachine.WIFI_STATE;
  message.arg2 = WifiManagerMachine.MSG_WIFI_ON;
  message.obj = new String(characteric.getValue());
end note
IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine : WifiConfigState.processMessage
DevicesManagerMachine -> IotRecorderManager : processMessage
note right of DevicesManagerMachine
  message.what = IotRecorderManager.WIFI_STATE;
  message.obj = msg.obj;
  message.arg1 = IotRecorderManager.MSG_WIFI_STATE_ON;
  mClientHandler.sendMessage(message);
end note

IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine : setWifiState
DevicesManagerMachine -> BluetoothGattConfig : setWifiState
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGattConfig : CMD_ENABLE_WIFI
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGattConfig : setCharacteristic
note right of BluetoothGattConfig
  CMD_ENABLE_WIFI
end note
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGattConfig : writeCharacteristic
note right of BluetoothGattConfig
  向服务端传递数据
end note

IotRecorderManager -> DevicesManagerMachine : wifiScan
DevicesManagerMachine -> BluetoothGattConfig : wifiScan
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGattConfig : CMD_SCAN_WIFI_LIST
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGattConfig : setUuidRequestScan
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGattConfig : setCharacteristic
note right of BluetoothGattConfig
  CMD_GET_SCAN_WIFILIST
end note
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGattConfig : writeCharacteristic
note right of BluetoothGattConfig
  向服务端传递数据
end note
BluetoothGattConfig -> BluetoothGattConfig : UUID_WIFI_ACCESSPOINT
note right of BluetoothGattConfig
  << sendWifiList << SCAN_RESULTS_AVAILABLE_ACTION
end note
BluetoothGattConfig -> WifiList : updateAccessPoints

@enduml
